title: nigritella corneliana
intro: Nigritella corneliana, also known as the yellow ghost orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the European Alps. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Nigritella corneliana are attributed to its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
